label.zh: 传统大型药企(2009 年前)

description.en: GSK as a self-contained pharma company optimising for blockbuster drugs (>$1B/yr each) sold in OECD markets. IP defended through patents until expiry, then loses to generics. Compounds with potential activity against neglected tropical diseases (NTDs) sit idle in the portfolio — no profitable market.
description.zh: GSK 作为一家自给自足的药企,围绕「重磅药」(单品 > 10 亿美元/年)在经合组织市场做优化。IP 靠专利保护,专利到期后输给仿制药。组合内对被忽视热带病(NTD)可能有效的化合物则一直闲置 —— 没有盈利市场。
